description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release_actions that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have two jobs: build_deb and build-appimage. The build_deb job runs on ubuntu-latest, installs dependencies, checks out the repository, builds a .deb file using cmake, and uploads the generated .deb file to the release. The build-appimage job runs on ubuntu-18.04, installs dependencies, checks out the repository, prepares files needed to create an AppImage, builds AntiMicroX, creates an AppImage file, and uploads the generated AppImage files to the release.
